impact: The daemon now has narrow fixture-first and validation-first work queued, allowing it to continue toward public crawling, extraction, process modeling, guardrails, and mocked DevHub workflow support without touching live private automation or application artifacts.
summary: Appended the next ordered PP&D backlog tranche to the daemon task board while preserving all completed tasks.
target_task: Supervisor repair: all PP&D daemon tasks are complete; review the original PP&D goal and add the next task-board tranche

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
